name: Bacon-Cheese Rollups
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine milk and cream cheese mixture until smooth.
2. Spread about 2 teaspoons of the mixture onto each side of a slice of bread.
3. Place bacon on one side of the bread, fold over to create a rollup, and secure with toothpicks or kitchen twine.
4. Arrange rolls in a single layer on a baking sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until bacon is browned.
6. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
7. These can be frozen for up to one month, thaw overnight in the refrigerator before cooking. Yields approximately 50 rollups.
